features.name: zero_width_unpacked_array_with_element_access
features.description: Code should include a zero-width unpacked array declaration with element access used in module instantiation
features.snippet: module top(); wire array[0:0]; wire out; sub #(.d(1)) inst(.in(array[0]), .out(out)); endmodule

features.name: zero_width_unpacked_array_declaration
features.description: Code should include a zero-width unpacked array wire declaration used in port connection

features.name: parameterized_module_instantiation_with_array_port
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module instantiation with array signal connected to input port
